title: clerodendrum anomalum
intro: Clerodendrum anomalum, also known as the tree glorybower, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Clerodendrum anomalum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, Clerodendrum anomalum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
